notes: v248 — Director buying is back, plus a whole signals pack. NEW confirmed layer: for shares on screen, the app now checks the official ASX announcements feed — a real Appendix 3Y filing shows as '🧑‍💼 Director ✓' (confirmed, last 5 days), and the News column upgrades to '📢 News ✓' / '🔇 Quiet ✓' with the actual headline on hover. When the feed can't be reached, the honest estimates stand in as before — confirmed and estimated are always clearly labelled. The old price/volume estimate is renamed '🕵️ Informed?' so it reads like what it is. FOUR new signal flags, all computed from your saved history at no extra download cost: 🚀 Breakout (closed above its stored-year high on volume), 📉 Dist? (falling on heavy volume — the bearish mirror), 🥇 Vol record (highest volume in its stored history), ⤴ MA cross (20-day average crossed above the 50-day today). The Signals sort now counts all flags too. Everything remains an aid for research — not advice.
